title: CSIR SERC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 64 Project Assistant and Project Associate Posts
description: CSIR-Structural Engineering Research Centre (CSIR-SERC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 64 Project Assistant and Project Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Diploma, B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR SERC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for the...
